title: Vinsani Plastic Clothes Peg Basket 36 Piece Set Multicoloured - Strong Grip and Windproof Laundry Pegs Quality Non-Slip Clothes Pins for Home and Garden
features: DURABLE MATERIAL: The laundry pegs are made of a soft pp material that is UVA/UVB resistant, colourfast, and odourless. These clothespins will serve you well for many years, whether you use them inside or outside.

STRONG GRIP: The plastic pegs are designed with a high-tension coil stainless steel spring and a frosted finger pad for a strong grip. It can firmly hold clothes and withstand strong winds and humid weather.
MULTIPLE USE: Household plastic pegs are ideal for a variety of uses, including drying clothes, food sealing, office and garden uses.
PEGS & BASKET DIMENSION: The plastic basket measures 11 x 12.5 x 24 cm and each peg measures 3.7 x 1.5 x 8 cm approx.
PACKAGE INCLUDES: Pack of 36 clothes pegs in different colors: blue, green, pink and yellow and 1 plastic basket.
